summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No merge is recommended because the artifact does not include Codex /review proof and several PRs also have failed checks, waiting-on-author state, or broad-delta risk.

actions.reason: Potentially landable after final maintainer repair/preflight, but merge_candidate is not safe without required /review and mergeability proof.
Contributor branch is maintainable, but failed checks and missing review preflight require repair before any merge recommendation.
Broad provider/config/docs delta plus active waiting-on-author state and failed checks require maintainer judgment before repair or merge planning.
The code appears focused, but the waiting-on-author label is an explicit active follow-up blocker for this job.
The PR may be valuable but its XL session-state rewrite needs maintainer review before merge or replacement planning.

needs_human: #93388: broad dirty provider/config/docs delta, waiting-on-author state, and failed checks need maintainer judgment.
#92591: waiting-on-author state blocks finalization despite otherwise focused passing checks.
#92610: XL session-state delta needs maintainer judgment before merge or repair path.

repair_candidate.summary: No replacement PR should be opened from this plan. #93293 and #93384 are the only concrete repair candidates, but the artifact lacks failure logs and required Codex /review/mergeability proof, so the next safe step is contributor-branch repair/preflight rather than a new replacement branch.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair contributor PR preflight for compaction replay and status model usage
repair_candidate.pr_body: Plan-only repair artifact for contributor-branch preflight on source PRs https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93293 and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93384. No replacement PR should be opened from this plan. Repair should preserve source PR attribution and contributor credit for @mushuiyu886 on #93293 and @zhangguiping-xydt on #93384, then rerun pnpm check:changed and Codex /review before any merge recommendation.
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for mushuiyu886 on #93293 if repaired.
Preserve contributor credit for zhangguiping-xydt on #93384 if repaired.
